zolfo-medicina-estetica.tagline: Your medical clinic open 24/7. Designed to convert visits into patients.
zolfo-medicina-estetica.description:
I designed and developed a premium portal for Zolfo Medicina Estética with a clear goal: capture high-value patients organically. With an ultra-fast structure optimized for Google, the site positions each individual treatment and guides users to contact the clinic in seconds.

WHAT IT SOLVES
Most medical clinics depend 100% on paid ads or Instagram to get bookings. If the algorithm changes or ad budget drops, inquiries crash. Zolfo now has its own organic channel that attracts patients every day automatically.

features.title: Individual SEO per treatment
features.desc: Each medical service has its own Google-optimized page. If someone searches for a specific treatment in the area, Zolfo appears first.

features.title: Direct WhatsApp conversion
features.desc: The navigation flow is designed so users can book an appointment or consult with one click, reducing friction to a minimum.

features.title: Simple admin panel
features.desc: Total control of text, photos, and treatments without relying on a developer. Uploading new content takes less than a minute.

features.title: Extreme speed & Lighthouse 100
features.desc: The site loads instantly on any mobile phone, improving patient experience and search ranking.

features.title: Total safety & stability
features.desc: Hosted on global servers with 100% uptime. Zero maintenance overhead or downtime.

metrics.title: Metrics & Outcomes
metrics.treatments_desc: Views distribution per treatment (GA Page Views)

cards.desc: Inquiries generated in 30 days

nurestetica.tagline: A premium online presence. Designed to build immediate trust.
nurestetica.description:
I developed NurEstética's corporate site focusing on a premium visual experience and instant loading speeds. In the aesthetic industry, first impressions are everything; this web reflects the clinic's quality, cleanliness, and professionalism from the very first millisecond.

WHAT IT SOLVES
A slow website or a neglected design scares off high-value clients and ruins your brand's credibility. NurEstética eliminates this friction with a polished interface and speed that outpaces 99% of competitors, ensuring more visitors complete the booking form.

features.title: High-end visual design
features.desc: A clean, interactive aesthetic aligned with the clinic's identity. Looks beautiful on any mobile or tablet.

features.title: Instant page loads
features.desc: Extreme optimizations so the site opens in under half a second, keeping impatient users engaged.

features.title: Booking-oriented layout
features.desc: Clear and strategic call-to-actions to easily guide users to book a consultation.

features.title: Perfect visual stability
features.desc: No annoying layout shifts while loading. Everything looks fluid and stable from the start.

features.title: Cloud infrastructure
features.desc: State-of-the-art hosting with zero maintenance, so you can forget about server crashes and updates.

cards.label: User Experience
cards.desc: Real user performance score on Vercel Edge

cards.label: Load Speed
cards.desc: Ultra-fast server response time (TTFB)

cards.label: Visual Stability
cards.desc: 0.00 CLS, no annoying screen shifts while loading

cards.label: SEO Optimization
cards.desc: Max score on Google's Lighthouse audit

authmotion.tagline: Control who enters your system. And what they can do.
authmotion.description:
I built a production-ready authentication and permission system. Designed for businesses that manage users, roles, and sensitive data — and cannot afford a security breach.

WHAT IT SOLVES
Every digital business faces the same challenge: controlling who accesses what. An employee shouldn't see what an admin sees. A client shouldn't touch what an operator touches.
AuthMotion solves this from day one.

features.title: Secure login with two-factor verification
features.desc: Your account protected with a second layer. If someone steals the password, it's not enough.

features.title: Access with Google or GitHub
features.desc: Your users log in with one click using their existing accounts. Frictionless.

features.title: Custom roles and permissions
features.desc: Admins, editors, clients. Each sees and does only what they are supposed to.

features.title: Designed to scale
features.desc: If you go from 100 to 100,000 users, the system won't break or slow down.

features.title: Secure by default
features.desc: Complies with the highest industry standards to protect your customer data.

cards.label: License
cards.desc: Open Source with no recurring licensing costs

cards.label: Authentication
cards.desc: Reinforced security for administrative accounts

cards.label: Integration
cards.desc: One-click connection with Google and GitHub

cards.label: Deployment
cards.desc: Deployable on any public or private cloud

smartwallet.tagline: The financial engine your business needs. Zero ledger errors, maximum security.
smartwallet.description:
I built SmartWallet, a bank-grade financial engine designed for businesses that need to process payments, payouts, and internal balances with absolute precision. It uses double-entry bookkeeping to ensure every cent is accounted for, preventing accounting gaps and fraud.

WHAT IT SOLVES
Managing the finances of a digital platform on spreadsheets or simple databases exposes your business to rounding errors, duplicate funds, and security gaps. SmartWallet automates ledger registration with total cryptographic integrity, protecting your company's most important asset.

features.title: Double-entry bookkeeping
features.desc: The standard used by banks. Every movement creates matching credit and debit logs that balance to zero. No ledger gaps.

features.title: Bank-grade security vault
features.desc: Maximum protection of credentials, encryption keys, and sensitive data on secure hardware modules.

features.title: Ultra-secure transactions
features.desc: Safe logic preventing double-spending or concurrent payout failures. Money is never lost in transit.

features.title: API connector for platforms
features.desc: Designed to easily connect with your existing sales system, e-commerce, or mobile app.

features.title: Full audit trail & history
features.desc: Unalterable logs for every transaction, allowing rapid accounting audits and fraud prevention.

cards.label: Ledger Precision
cards.desc: Double-entry standard, perfect balances with no lost cents

cards.label: Data Security
cards.desc: Secrets and cryptographic keys protected at bank-grade level

cards.label: Integrity
cards.desc: Operations shielded against network drops or system crashes

cards.label: Integration
cards.desc: Easy to connect to any modern web or mobile platform

malcombuilder.tagline: The showcase of my technical studio. Designed to convert visits into clients.
malcombuilder.description:
This is my own platform. I designed and built it using advanced AI as an execution lever to achieve a flawless, ultra-fast, and premium multilingual site. It showcases my work philosophy: extreme speed, author design, and zero user friction.

WHAT IT SOLVES
A slow or generic portfolio fails to convince anyone. This site serves as a living proof of concept of what I can build for your business: an interactive experience that loads in milliseconds, speaks your client's language, and builds immediate trust to close the sale.

features.title: Premium interactive experience
features.desc: Fluid animations and micro-interactions that capture attention without slowing navigation.

features.title: Native multi-locale (ES/EN)
features.desc: Automatic detection and instant server-side language switching without page reloads.

features.title: State-of-the-art performance
features.desc: Perfect scores on Google's performance audits, ensuring top organic ranking.

features.title: Smooth Dark / Light toggle
features.desc: Intelligent adaptation to the user's color scheme with smooth, natural transitions.

features.title: Total SEO optimization
features.desc: Fully indexable site structure, automated sitemap, and dynamic metadata for maximum visibility.

cards.label: Conversion
cards.desc: Step-by-step interactive onboarding and one-click contact

cards.label: Localization
cards.desc: next-intl translating directly from the closest CDN edge server

cards.label: Performance

pulse.tagline: Protect your revenue. Constant website monitoring with instant alerts.
pulse.description:
I created Pulse to solve a critical issue: finding out that your website or online store went down before your customers do. It checks your platform's status continuously every 5 minutes and immediately notifies you via Telegram if something goes wrong, letting you react before losing sales.

WHAT IT SOLVES
Every minute of downtime is lost money and frustrated customers. Relying on someone to tell you or checking manually is unsustainable. Pulse automates this 24/7 watch, giving you full visibility of your digital business's stability.

features.title: Active 24/7 watch
features.desc: Automatic pings every 5 minutes to ensure your site is always online and reachable.

features.title: Instant notifications
features.desc: Alerts sent directly to your Telegram account in under a second if your website fails.

features.title: SSL certificate monitoring
features.desc: Pre-expiry alerts preventing browsers from blocking your site with a red "insecure website" screen.

features.title: Automated monthly reports
features.desc: Detailed PDF reports delivered to your inbox with response times and server stability statistics.

features.title: Integrated control panel
features.desc: A visual dashboard to inspect incident history and real-time response times.

cards.label: Check Frequency
cards.desc: Continuous uptime verification from global server endpoints

cards.label: Alert Channel
cards.desc: Instant notification to your phone at the slightest downtime

cards.label: Uptime History
cards.desc: Detailed incident log to audit and monitor your hosting providers

cards.label: SSL Monitoring
cards.desc: Prevents scary warning pages on your customers' browsers
